scripts.test: npm --prefix frontend test && npm --prefix backend test
scripts.install-all: concurrently "cd frontend && npm ci" "cd backend && npm ci"
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd frontend && npm run dev" "cd backend && npm start"
scripts.start: concurrently "cd frontend && npm run start" "cd backend && npm run start"
scripts.lint: npm --prefix frontend run lint && npm --prefix backend run lint
